NewStrings.LOC_FN_HouseBuyBravil: I think 12000 gold is a fair price.
NewStrings.LOC_FN_HouseTooMuchBravil: 12000 gold for that? No thank you.
NewStrings.LOC_FN_HouseTooMuchLeyawiin: 30,000 gold is too much for me.
NewStrings.LOC_FN_HouseBuyChorrol: 100,000 gold you say? It's a deal.
NewStrings.LOC_FN_HouseBuySkingrad: It's a great deal at 125,000 gold.
NewStrings.LOC_FN_HouseTooMuchSkingrad: 125,000 is too rich for my blood.
NewStrings.LOC_FN_HouseBuyBruma: I'll gladly pay 40,000 gold for it.
NewStrings.LOC_FN_HouseTooMuchCheydinhal: I'm afraid 70,000 gold is too much.
NewStrings.LOC_RT_Soyouveraide_0: So, you've raided a number of non-tribal goblin lairs and killed the shaman? Excellent!
NewStrings.LOC_RT_Withallthose_1: With all those goblins now dead, Cyrodiil is finally free of their terror!
NewStrings.LOC_RT_Ithinkthisde_2: I think this deserves an extra reward. I hereby declare you Knight Commander of the Dragonborne!
NewStrings.LOC_RT_Inrecognitio_3: In recognition of your new rank, please accept this fine amulet. May it serve you well as you perform further noble deeds!
NewStrings.LOC_RT_AllhailtheKn_4: All hail the Knights of the Dragonborne!
NewStrings.LOC_RT_Soyouveraide_5: So, you've raided a number of non-tribal goblin lairs and killed the shaman? Excellent!
NewStrings.LOC_RT_HoweverIspec_6: However, I specifically asked you to kill the tribal shamans. Come back when you've done that.
NewStrings.LOC_RT_AlrightthenH_8: Alright then. Here you go. Best of luck to you.
NewStrings.LOC_RT_ExcellentKee_10: Excellent! Keeping this totem in our hands will further reduce the goblin menace that plagues Cyrodiil!
NewStrings.LOC_RT_Youhavemycon_11: You have my congratulations, Knight of the Dragonborne!
NewStrings.LOC_RT_ExcellentKee_13: Excellent! Keeping this totem in our hands will further reduce the goblin menace that plagues Cyrodiil!
NewStrings.LOC_RT_Youhavemycon_14: You have my congratulations, Knight of the Dragonborne!
NewStrings.LOC_RT_Ohandthissma_15: Oh, and this small monetary reward.
NewStrings.LOC_RT_Andheresyour_16: And here's your bonus for recovering seven totems.
NewStrings.LOC_RT_ExcellentKee_18: Excellent! Keeping this totem in our hands will further reduce the goblin menace that plagues Cyrodiil!
NewStrings.LOC_RT_Youhavemycon_19: You have my congratulations, Knight of the Dragonborne!
NewStrings.LOC_RT_Ohandthissma_20: Oh, and this small monetary reward.

NewStrings.LOC_RT_Hereisyourbo_128: Here is your bounty for this shield, Knight of the Dragonborne!
NewStrings.LOC_RT_ExcellentAno_130: Excellent! Another foul goblin meets its end at the hands of a Knight of the Dragonborne!
NewStrings.LOC_RT_Iwillpaya10g_131: I will pay a 10 gold bounty for each shield that you bring me.
NewStrings.LOC_RT_Hereisyourbo_132: Here is your bounty for this shield, Knight of the Dragonborne!
NewStrings.LOC_RT_ExcellentThe_133: Excellent! The Knights of the Dragonborne triumph over the goblin menace!
NewStrings.LOC_RT_Ithankyouyou_134: I thank you, your fellow knights thank you, Cyrodiil thanks you. You have done a great service.
NewStrings.LOC_RT_Forsucceedin_135: For succeeding where so many have failed, I present you with this ring. It will identify you as a Knight Errant of the Dragonborne.
NewStrings.LOC_RT_Wearitproudl_136: Wear it proudly, as you perform further noble deeds.
NewStrings.LOC_RT_AllhailtheKn_137: All hail the Knights of the Dragonborne!
NewStrings.LOC_FN_zOOOQuestDone: The goblin tribes are no more!
NewStrings.LOC_RT_ThenIwilldel_138: Then I will delay you no longer, noble Knight!
NewStrings.LOC_RT_Wellmetandha_139: Well met and hail, fellow Knight!
NewStrings.LOC_RT_Wellmetandha_140: Well met and hail, Knight of the Dragonborne!
NewStrings.LOC_RT_Wellmetandha_141: Well met and hail, Knight of the Dragonborne!
NewStrings.LOC_RT_Itisgoodthat_142: It is good that we have destroyed the goblin tribes of Cyrodiil.
NewStrings.LOC_RT_Butthereares_143: But there are still goblins at large in our fair land - goblins that do not belong to any tribe.
NewStrings.LOC_RT_TheKnightsof_144: The Knights of the Dragonborne must remain vigilant against these goblins!
NewStrings.LOC_RT_Wellmetandha_145: Well met and hail, Knight of the Dragonborne!
NewStrings.LOC_RT_Wellmetandha_147: Well met and hail, Knight of the Dragonborne!
NewStrings.LOC_RT_Ihaveataskfo_148: I have a task for you.
NewStrings.LOC_RT_Asyouhavepro_149: As you have proved capable of penetrating deep into a goblin lair, you are the perfect candidate for this little task.
NewStrings.LOC_RT_YouaretoridC_150: You are to rid Cyrodiil of all known goblin tribes! For the greater glory of the Knights of the Dragonborne!
NewStrings.LOC_RT_Yourfellowkn_151: Your fellow knights have reported that there are seven main goblin tribes in Cyrodiil, as well as a number of independent groups.
NewStrings.LOC_RT_Yourtaskisto_152: Your task is to concentrate on the main tribes. Your fellow knights will take care of the other groups.
NewStrings.LOC_RT_Youhavealrea_153: You have already encountered the White Skin tribe. The others are the Bloody Hand, the Rock Biter, the Skull Breaker...
NewStrings.LOC_RT_theDustEater_154: ... the Dust Eater, the Three Feather, and the Sharp Tooth. All of these have lairs within Cyrodiil, but I do not know of their exact location.
NewStrings.LOC_RT_Returntomewh_155: Return to me when you have found and destroyed all of the tribal lairs, and you will be rewarded.
NewStrings.LOC_RT_Wellmetandha_156: Well met and hail, fellow Knight!
NewStrings.LOC_RT_Wellmetandha_157: Well met and hail, Knight of the Dragonborne!
NewStrings.LOC_RT_Agoblintribe_158: A goblin tribe? The ones that kidnapped him? And they made him their 'shaman'?
NewStrings.LOC_RT_Howcanthegod_159: How can the gods let this happen? He was so young! And to grow up thinking he was a goblin...
NewStrings.LOC_RT_Isupposeitsg_160: I suppose it's good that you found him before my father did. It would have broken his heart.
NewStrings.LOC_RT_Iwillarrange_161: I will arrange for his body to be recovered. I doubt there will be many goblins in that lair, now you've killed their 'shaman'.
NewStrings.LOC_RT_Andforyourse_162: And for your service, henceforth, you shall be known as Knight of the Dragonborne!
NewStrings.LOC_RT_Nowifyouwill_163: Now, if you will excuse me, I need some time to grieve for my brother.
NewStrings.LOC_RT_SorryIdontre_164: Sorry, I don't recognize that ring at all.
NewStrings.LOC_RT_Youshouldsho_165: You should show that ring to Sir Alain Uruk. He's somewhere around town.
NewStrings.LOC_RT_HmmIthinktha_166: Hmm. I think that ring bears the crest of the Uruk family, but I'm not absolutely certain.
NewStrings.LOC_RT_Youshouldsho_167: You should show it to Sir Alain Uruk. He's staying in town at the moment. At the Two Sisters, I think.
NewStrings.LOC_RT_SorryIdontre_168: Sorry, I don't recognize that ring at all.
NewStrings.LOC_RT_Youshouldsho_169: You should show that ring to Sir Alain Uruk. He's staying at the Two Sisters Lodge in Skingrad.
NewStrings.LOC_RT_OkayfriendIl_170: Okay friend, I like you so I'll tell you.
NewStrings.LOC_RT_Thatringbear_171: That ring bears the crest of the Uruk family. There aren't many of them nobles around any more.
NewStrings.LOC_RT_IheardthatSi_172: I heard that Sir Alain Uruk is the last of his line. Somebody told me that he's staying in the Two Sisters Lodge in Skingrad.
NewStrings.LOC_RT_Perhapsyoush_173: Perhaps you should look for him there.
NewStrings.LOC_RT_SorryIdontre_174: Sorry, I don't recognize that ring at all.
NewStrings.LOC_RT_Youshouldsho_175: You should show that ring to Sir Alain Uruk. He's staying at the Two Sisters Lodge, over by Salmo's.
NewStrings.LOC_RT_OkayfriendIl_176: Okay friend, I like you so I'll tell you.
NewStrings.LOC_RT_Thatringbear_177: That ring bears the crest of the Uruk family. There aren't many of them nobles around any more.
NewStrings.LOC_RT_IheardthatSi_178: I heard that Sir Alain Uruk is the last of his line. Somebody told me that he's staying in the Two Sisters Lodge, over by Salmo's.
NewStrings.LOC_RT_Perhapsyoush_179: Perhaps you should look for him there.
NewStrings.LOC_RT_WhyshouldIsp_180: Why should I speak to you? I am a noble Knight. You are nothing.
NewStrings.LOC_RT_Taketheringt_181: Take the ring to our leader, Sir Alain Uruk, in Skingrad.
NewStrings.LOC_RT_Thisringyous_182: This ring - you say you found it on another Knight?
NewStrings.LOC_RT_OhdearInCrac_183: Oh dear. In Cracked Wood Cave?
NewStrings.LOC_RT_Ifearedasmuc_184: I feared as much. Sveyn was a little too green for my liking.
NewStrings.LOC_RT_Itriedtowarn_185: I tried to warn Sir Alain that he wasn't ready, but...
NewStrings.LOC_RT_Ohwellyoudbe_186: Oh well, you'd better take the ring to Sir Alain Uruk. He's the leader of our order.
NewStrings.LOC_RT_Youshouldbea_187: You should be able to find him in Skingrad. If he isn't off killing goblins somewhere.
NewStrings.LOC_RT_Idonthavetim_188: I don't have time to stand around talking about jewelry with the likes of you. Go away.
NewStrings.LOC_RT_Showtheringt_189: Show the ring to Sir Alain Uruk in Skingrad.
NewStrings.LOC_RT_NowgoawayImo_190: Now go away. I'm on duty.
NewStrings.LOC_RT_Youfoundthis_191: You found this ring on a Knight of the Dragonborne in Cracked Wood Cave?
NewStrings.LOC_RT_HmmImsuretha_192: Hmm... I'm sure that this ring bears the crest of the noble Uruk family.
NewStrings.LOC_RT_Thatmakessen_193: That makes sense, I suppose. Sir Alain Uruk is the leader of the Knights of the Dragonborne in Cyrodiil.
NewStrings.LOC_RT_LastIheardhe_194: Last I heard, he was in Skingrad.
NewStrings.LOC_RT_Nowifyoullex_195: Now if you'll excuse me, I'm on duty.
NewStrings.LOC_RT_FindSirAlain_196: Find Sir Alain Uruk. He's somewhere around town.
NewStrings.LOC_RT_NowgoawayImo_197: Now go away. I'm on duty.
NewStrings.LOC_RT_Youfoundthis_198: You found this ring on a Knight of the Dragonborne in Cracked Wood Cave?
NewStrings.LOC_RT_HmmImsuretha_199: Hmm... I'm sure that this ring bears the crest of the noble Uruk family.
NewStrings.LOC_RT_Thatmakessen_200: That makes sense, I suppose. Sir Alain Uruk is the leader of the Knights of the Dragonborne in Cyrodiil.
NewStrings.LOC_RT_Youcanfindhi_201: You can find him somewhere around town. Try the Two Sisters Lodge - I think he's staying there.
NewStrings.LOC_RT_Nowifyoullex_202: Now if you'll excuse me, I'm on duty.
NewStrings.LOC_RT_Idontcareabo_203: I don't care about your trinkets. I am a noble Knight of the Dragonborne. You are nothing to me. Get out of my sight.
NewStrings.LOC_RT_Thisringitbe_204: This ring... it belonged to one of my knights. Where did you find it?
NewStrings.LOC_RT_WhatringThat_205: What ring? That? No, I don't recognize it at all. You won't catch me that easily!
NewStrings.LOC_RT_Dontkeepgett_206: Don't keep getting that ring out, fool. You'll ruin everything!
NewStrings.LOC_RT_Justtakeitto_207: Just take it to Sir Alain Uruk. But don't tell him I sent you.
NewStrings.LOC_RT_Nonoitcantbe_210: No, no, it can't be. It's one of those knights, isn't it?
NewStrings.LOC_RT_ItsthatSirAl_211: It's that Sir Alain Uruk, the so-called noble knight staying at the Two Sisters, telling everybody he's looking for his brother.
NewStrings.LOC_RT_Asifanybodyw_212: As if anybody would believe that! I know why he's really here!
NewStrings.LOC_RT_ButIwonttell_213: But I won't tell, no no no. That would ruin everything! Everything!
NewStrings.LOC_RT_SorryIdontre_214: Sorry, I don't recognize that ring at all.
NewStrings.LOC_RT_LikeIsaidsho_215: Like I said, show it to Sir Alain Uruk. He's in Skingrad.
NewStrings.LOC_RT_Yousayyoufou_216: You say you found this ring on a Knight of the Dragonborne?
NewStrings.LOC_RT_InCrackedWoo_217: In Cracked Wood Cave? Oh, I suppose they were trying to clear out the goblins.
NewStrings.LOC_RT_WellImsorryb_218: Well, I'm sorry, but I don't know anything about the crest on this ring.
NewStrings.LOC_RT_ButIdidheart_219: But I did hear that Sir Alain Uruk, the leader of the Knights of the Dragonborne, is currently in Skingrad. Maybe you should take it to show him.
NewStrings.LOC_RT_Thisringitbe_220: This ring... it belonged to one of my knights. Where did you find it?
NewStrings.LOC_RT_Thisringitbe_221: This ring... it belonged to my father. Where did you find it?
NewStrings.LOC_RT_SorryIdontre_222: Sorry, I don't recognize that ring at all.

NewStrings.LOC_RT_WhatInFatbac_241: What? In Fatback Cave? Oh no!
NewStrings.LOC_RT_Thatwaswhere_242: That was where Sir Roderic was heading. It can't be his ring, can it?

NewStrings.LOC_RT_ButIwonttell_270: But I won't tell, no no no. That would ruin everything! Everything!
NewStrings.LOC_RT_SorryIdontre_271: Sorry, I don't recognize that ring at all.
NewStrings.LOC_RT_LikeIsaidsho_272: Like I said, show it to Sir Alain Uruk. He's in Skingrad.
NewStrings.LOC_RT_Yousayyoufou_273: You say you found this ring on a Knight of the Dragonborne?
NewStrings.LOC_RT_InFatbackCav_274: In Fatback Cave? I heard it had become infested with goblins.
NewStrings.LOC_RT_WellImsorryb_275: Well, I'm sorry, but I don't know anything about the crest on this ring.
NewStrings.LOC_RT_ButIdidheart_276: But I did hear that Sir Alain Uruk, the leader of the Knights of the Dragonborne, is currently in Skingrad. Maybe you should take it to show him.
NewStrings.LOC_RT_Nowletmegrie_278: Now let me grieve in peace.
NewStrings.LOC_RT_Nowletmegrie_280: Now let me grieve in peace.
NewStrings.LOC_RT_JimWhoYouOoh_283: Jim? Who? You? Ooh! Goblin! Eek! Goblin kill Jim! Jim kill goblin! Goblin Jim kill!
NewStrings.LOC_RT_WhoJimWoohJi_284: Who? Jim? Wooh! Jim! Goblin, gobjim, jimgob, lingob! Jim!
NewStrings.LOC_RT_JimJimJimjim_286: Jim? Jim! Jim jimminy jimmy! Goblin Jim? Jim Goblin!
NewStrings.LOC_RT_OhwellIsuppo_288: Oh well, I suppose I'll just have to keep looking. Goodbye.
NewStrings.LOC_RT_GreatLikeIsa_289: Great! Like I said, I haven't seen him since we were children.
NewStrings.LOC_RT_Hewaskidnapp_290: He was kidnapped by the goblins that killed my mother.
NewStrings.LOC_RT_Heprobablylo_291: He probably looks similar to me, although he's slightly younger.
NewStrings.LOC_RT_ImsorryIhave_292: I'm sorry I haven't got any more to go on, but if you do find him, let him know where I am.
NewStrings.LOC_RT_Andletmeknow_293: And let me know where he is, so we can arrange to meet.
NewStrings.LOC_RT_Itoldhimhewa_295: I told him he was getting too old to go out fighting goblins.
NewStrings.LOC_RT_Hesalwayshad_296: He's always had a thing about goblins, you see. That's why he formed the Knights of the Dragonborne.
NewStrings.LOC_RT_Whenmybrothe_297: When my brother and I were children, we were driven from our home by a marauding tribe of goblins.
NewStrings.LOC_RT_Theykilledmy_298: They... killed my mother, and my father swore that he wouldn't rest until all of the goblin tribes in Cyrodiil had been destroyed.
NewStrings.LOC_RT_Soheformedth_299: So he formed the Knights of the Dragonborne, and recruited others to help him locate and destroy all goblin lairs.
NewStrings.LOC_RT_IbecameaKnig_300: I became a Knight when I came of age, and I have slain many goblins, and cleared many lairs.
NewStrings.LOC_RT_ButonelairIw_301: But one lair I was not able to clear was Fatback Cave. That's why my father had gone there.
NewStrings.LOC_RT_Toprovethath_302: To prove that he wasn't too old, and that he was still a greater knight than I.
NewStrings.LOC_RT_Wellthankyou_304: Well, thank you for returning his ring. I'll make arrangements for a monument to be erected in his honor.
NewStrings.LOC_RT_Itoldhimhewa_305: I told him he was getting too old to go out fighting goblins.
NewStrings.LOC_RT_Hesalwayshad_306: He's always had a thing about goblins, you see. That's why he formed the Knights of the Dragonborne.
NewStrings.LOC_RT_Whenmybrothe_307: When my brother and I were children, we were driven from our home by a marauding tribe of goblins.
NewStrings.LOC_RT_Theykilledmy_308: They... killed my mother, and my father swore that he wouldn't rest until all of the goblin tribes in Cyrodiil had been destroyed.
NewStrings.LOC_RT_Soheformedth_309: So he formed the Knights of the Dragonborne, and recruited others to help him locate and destroy all goblin lairs.
NewStrings.LOC_RT_IbecameaKnig_310: I became a Knight when I came of age, and I have slain many goblins, and cleared many lairs.
NewStrings.LOC_RT_ButonelairIw_311: But one lair I was not able to clear was Fatback Cave. That's why my father had gone there.
NewStrings.LOC_RT_Toprovethath_312: To prove that he wasn't too old, and that he was still a greater knight than I.
NewStrings.LOC_RT_Wellthankyou_314: Well, thank you for returning his ring. I'll make arrangements for a monument to be erected in his honor.
NewStrings.LOC_RT_Sayyouwouldn_315: Say, you wouldn't like to help me out on another matter, would you?
NewStrings.LOC_RT_Ivebeentryin_316: I've been trying to find my brother, who I haven't seen since we were children. Will you help me?
NewStrings.LOC_RT_Itoldhimhewa_317: I told him he was getting too old to go out fighting goblins.
NewStrings.LOC_RT_Hesalwayshad_318: He's always had a thing about goblins, you see. That's why he formed the Knights of the Dragonborne.

NewStrings.LOC_RT_Soheformedth_321: So he formed the Knights of the Dragonborne, and recruited others to help him locate and destroy all goblin lairs.

NewStrings.LOC_RT_ButonelairIw_323: But one lair I was not able to clear was Fatback Cave. That's why my father had gone there.
NewStrings.LOC_RT_Toprovethath_324: To prove that he wasn't too old, and that he was still a greater knight than I.
NewStrings.LOC_RT_Wellthankyou_326: Well, thank you for returning his ring. I'll make arrangements for a monument to be erected in his honor.
NewStrings.LOC_RT_Ohthenthatwa_327: Oh, then that was young Sveyn. Such a pity.
NewStrings.LOC_RT_Someofmyknig_328: Some of my knights said he wasn't ready, but I thought he would at least be able to clear that cave.
NewStrings.LOC_RT_Thankyouforr_330: Thank you for returning his ring, at least. I'll make the necessary arrangements.

NewStrings.LOC_RT_Ivebeentryin_340: I've been trying to find my brother, who I haven't seen since we were children. Will you help me?
NewStrings.LOC_RT_Doyouwantmet_341: Do you want me to follow you now?
NewStrings.LOC_RT_Doyouwantmet_342: Do you want me to continue following you?
